verdict: Vaseline Cocoa Butter variant adds rich emollient cocoa butter to the base petrolatum formula for enhanced nourishment. Good value upgrade over original with pleasant flavor and improved moisturizing power.

_research.name: Vaseline Lip Therapy Cocoa Butter
pros: Cocoa butter adds richness and flavor
_research.con: Cocoa butter may feel heavy; some users report stickiness.
